ya I gotta work around my nuzlocke too
skill issue, breathe through your skin like the rest of us
This nasal spray aint doing shit!
It says use to once every 3-4 hours, but this shit only lasts like 90 minutes TOPS
what if i want you to annoy people?
be careful with the nasal spray cause your body can get addicted to it and make the sinus clog worse
So I'm like sitting here like a heroin addict
This one is just a phenylephrine hydrochloride, whatever that is
there’s a whole show about that
fuckkkk I was about to get into bed but kitten decided she needed to get up
it’s about finding a miracle drug and the industry trying to shut it down
Meanwhile over here is aus we got the PBS (Pharmaceutical Benefits Scheme)
Lurker got me some new shirts recently and the one I was wearing today was doing that
No, its the government scheme that subsidises medicines to make them WAY more affordable
And then Trump wanted to tariff us if we didn't get rid of it
I will deal tho cause they are sleep token shirts wolskHands
caring about what trump says is quite a bad idea after all
can’t even be mad at the kitten all she wanted was cuddles lurker14Lurkcry
" Backed by the US pharmaceutical lobby, Trump's administration argued that Australia's price negotiation tactics artificially depress American drug profits"
our whole country is in ruins rm
not quite sure what to think about that one
steam OS is cool and all but the machine seems pretty whatever for the price
i can’t stop laughing at the whole reflecting pool debacle going on rn
Basically said he'd tariff us 200% if we didn't alter it. And literally everyside of politics here said Fuck you No
surely they didn't use it to scam more tax payer money into their own pockets or anything
oh he spent 14m painting the pool blue, now it’s full of algae and the blue is peeling off
@BustyCrustaceanLady no no. he withdrew 14m. spent is... highly unlikely
not like he bothers trying to hide his motivations
Well, we are now having to deal with our 'trumpism' politics which is called One Nation
its just one of many instances of laundering tax money to specific people through contracts under the guise of "doing something"
I play bad everyday so I can't relate
wasnt the paint peeling off cause they poured a bunch of peroxide to try and kill off the algae that was growing in there but they put in not even close to enough for the algae removal?
Pauline Hanson (think female trump but not funny at all) said she wanted to exported everyone who had even 1 parent not born in Australia

yeah, at least if you get rejected you can just move on to another application

oh god automod naroDespair my arch nemesis
Finally, name of hardcore cooperative first person survival shooter wolskCola
I beat the 1st one , and I LOVED it but the 2nd one sucks ass LUL
Wow this screen is tough! ~~~~ everything so pixel perfect! in order to win this you will not only have to precise! you'll have to be succesfful. Let me know your next question!
and yes I am doing them blind
despite how hard 1 was , it ended up in my top 5 Metroidvanias
I have like 3 friends that automod kills off like half my messages and I can only imagine it's out of spite with some of the mundane things it procks on
mallso subscribed with Prime. They've subscribed for 16 months! ha baba baba BABA ha baba BAB ABABABA BABABA
if I get auto modded a lot in a chat you bet your ass I’m outtie
but 2 just took all the good things about 1 and dumbed them down but then took all the bad things about 1 and amped them to 11 :(
I'm working nights so now I'm actually awake now.

seriously La Mulana 1 is hard , but if you are can put the riddles together its fair , 2 relies on cheap instakill traps and tanky enemies that hit you like truck, as well as the 2nd one item locks you WAY harder than 1 did
u just cleared that out of no where lol
1 had its moments , but the 2 one is constant
Oh wolsk, what editing software you use again?
I do recommend the 1st one sometime though if you ever get curious :) , its tough but so so SO worth it
Watch out Kid, these jumps look tough! you gotta be basically perfect!
I upgraded my premiere from v24 to v26 because I had to access someone elses project file, and wanted to keep myself safe
Fair fair , I thought that too though
but I eventually broke down and thought I would give it a go :) , I'm glad I did... for 1 at least
No work pays for it, but the update is so gross
I even want to challenge myself further , and do the 1st one as a Rando :F
They just, removed how masking worked and changed it completely. I had to look up a tutorial to find out how to do it
As its for the summer event though , I am still gonna finish 2 but I'm not gonna like it xD
all the more reason to refuse

if you practice when you're playing bad then on good days it'll be like taking the training weights off
No heartbeat monitor hooked up to bitrate script?
my internet has been acting up for a bit
Do you have a heartbeat monitor?
wait we have to think of the consequences of our actions here

ウォルフォックス subscribed at Tier 1. They've subscribed for 22 months! Since the last time I was here, I went from a mid level chemist to a systems quality engineer st Boeing. I fell as first into it. But whatever.

Right place right time. I have 2 degrees in biology and chemistry
I have 1 year manufacturing experience in satellites
A recruiter reached out, and now I'm here
A recruiter once reached out to me, it was selling magazines.
as a mentor im so proud of you

Getting that comfy job is almost surreal. but at the same time it's like...this is how it should be
Like I shouldn't work so hard and still worry

This community helped me through dozens of 12 hour shifts. All mentors. All brothers and sisters

yeah. im back in school in hope i get my dream job. but fingers crossed lol
i have an associates. so im back for a bachelors

Heck ya bushy. I got my first degree working full time. Keep the faith

For how long i've followed I know virtually nothing about this game other than it is pretty hard
This is so nostalgic for me. Watching these streams on overtime.
What is the Myhouse.wad of the fangame community
The greatest Doom level ever created
I know alot about doom and my house, I know much much less about iwbtg fangames
too many greats and a lot of split opinions, but if you did a big poll you'd probably get k3 as the 'best' and most well known
It is a doom wad that first plays on tropes. You start in a house that is clearly someone's home. Most people make their house first in doom wads. Its a trope
I heard someone made desert bus in trackmania and it takes about 14 hours
But myhouse... bends it. The house changes every time you enter a different room
someone made what seemed to be a simple map of their house, but it actually is much deeper with twisting paths and subversions, following a (vague) underlying mystery/story
Until it becomes a 'terrifying" high rise story possibly about abuse with new monsters
B3313 wishes it was like myhouse
there's a haunted mansion game that comes to mind, though i forget the name
Myhouse is definitely one of the best doom mods ever made.
It's not, it's one of the best fan levels ever
Yeah, I just think of torments work
Its far more classical doom, and wonderful
The Backrooms movie is weak fascimile of what myhouse did
I'd love to see you play a myhouse stream, tbh
@44m44 idk if were just talking about iwbtg games mb
It certainly meant something to the creator. I do not doubt that

myhouse is something that I feel any gamer should experience, it is not only so good. But insanely clever with how much it messes with Doom fanatics. Like what do you mean every 10 minutes it has a discord notification sound
As a person who plays every cacoaward doom level, it is superb.
How I would describe short. It is about looking into a childhood house that is MUCH larger on the inside than it is on the out
I did, and you'd never believe which one
I remember the silly PWADs like the one that turns all the enemies into Barney the Dinosaur
I don't speed run doom. Its a comfy cold blanket for me. I carefully investigate every level
if you know anything about the book House of Leaves, its heavily inspired by that
It straight up has a House of Leaves sequence you can miss
Doom has provided some of the best gameplay experiences of my life. There was a total conversion called 'Cold as hell'
Basically, it was. 'What if Soviets found demons immediately after ww2'
Oh yeah I remember that one
